text.title: Conventional Commits Enforced at the Hook Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule id from content/01-core-rules.xml for gov-conventional-commits-enforced.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the repo produce versioned releases or feed downstream consumers?

example.trace: Agent attempts `git commit -m "wip"` → commit-msg hook runs commitlint → reject 'type-enum' violation → agent edits to `fix(payments): handle retry race` → hook passes → CI PR-title check passes → release-please bumps patch on merge.
